input.tenant_message: The washing machine has been shaking violently during the spin cycle for the past few weeks — it literally walks across the floor and I have to hold it in place or it bangs into the wall. The noise is extremely loud, like a jet engine, and my downstairs neighbor has already complained twice. I've tried redistributing laundry loads but it doesn't help.

ai_output.recommended_action: Send a technician to inspect the washing machine drum bearings, shock absorbers/suspension rods, and leveling feet. Excessive vibration and movement typically indicates worn drum bearings or failed shock absorbers. Confirm the unit is properly leveled and anti-vibration pads are in place to protect the flooring.
